flags.title: Slicker Brush ad spend detected (LIQUIDATION violation — Day 2)
flags.problem: B0FQ628KCH received $1.37 in spend on Jul 15 (Query B) — continuing violation after Jul 16 flag. 7d total: $5.51. LIQUIDATION SKU must generate zero ad cost.
flags.solution: Pause all campaigns targeting B0FQ628KCH immediately.
flags.action: Ad Console → Campaigns → filter ASIN B0FQ628KCH → set all active campaigns to Paused.

flags.title: Dematter YELLOW band — ROAS 1.578; lower bids + rank defense 'dematting comb for dogs' (rank 26, down 4)
flags.problem: Dematter ROAS 1.578 on Jul 15 ($157.35 spend, $248.29 sales) — YELLOW band (breakeven 2.07, yellow_min 1.66). H10 Jul 16: 'dematting comb for dogs' dropped 4 spots to rank 26 (SV 5,818). 'detangler for dogs' dropped 3 spots to rank 17 (SV 1,561).
flags.solution: Lower Dematter bids 15-20% to pull ROAS toward breakeven; hold 'dematting comb for dogs' bid at ceiling — do not cut during rank slide on SV 5,818 keyword.
flags.action: Ad Console → Dematter campaigns → lower all keyword bids 15-20% EXCEPT 'dematting comb for dogs' → hold that bid at current ceiling.
flags.deadline_cost: $157.35/day in YELLOW band; rank 26 slide risk on SV 5,818 keyword if underfunded

flags.title: Detangling Treatment (B0GV5ZFLC2) HOLD — ROAS 3.087 GREEN Jul 15 but 7d TACOS 116.2%
flags.problem: Detangling ROAS 3.087 on Jul 15 ($12.30 spend, $37.98 sales) — GREEN. But 7d TACOS proxy 116.2%: $64.00 spend / $55.07 7d SC sales. Jul 15 was a single strong day; prior 6 days were weak. TACOS target is <35%.
flags.solution: HOLD current bids — do not increase budget. Monitor 7d rolling ROAS. If next 3 days sustain GREEN, revert to normal bid schedule.
flags.action: Ad Console → Detangling campaigns → no change. Log Jul 15 as positive data point. Revisit 2026-07-20.
flags.deadline_cost: Increasing bids risks amplifying 116.2% 7d TACOS; HOLD protects margin until pattern confirmed
